code: import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Options(_ref){let{question,dispatch,answer}=_ref;const hasAnswered=answer!=null;const articles=["der","die","das"];return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"options",children:articles.map(article=>{let buttonClass="btn btn-option";if(hasAnswered){if(article===question.article)buttonClass+=" correct";else if(article===answer)buttonClass+=" wrong";else buttonClass+=" muted";}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:buttonClass,disabled:hasAnswered,onClick:()=>dispatch({type:"newAnswer",payload:article}),children:article},article);})});}export default Options;
